page_content: Requirements World Language requirement: Two semesters of a second (world) language for a minimum of basic proficiency. Statistical Analysis course: BMGT230 (AR), CCJS200 (AR), EDMS451 (AR), PSYC200 (AR), SOCY201 (AR), or STAT100 (MA & AR) PLCY304: Evaluating Evidence: Finding Truth in Numbers (Students may also petition for other methodology courses) CHOOSE ONE: GFPL/PLCY400: Capstone GFPL/PLCY309: Internship in Political Institutions OR Study Abroad Credits 6 to 12 3 3 3 Grade Blank Blank Blank Blank
